info.title: URGE v2 API
info.description: Prompt registry and version control API. Manage prompts, versions, render templates, store LLM results, run evaluation pipelines, and score results with LLM-based quality evaluations.

CollectionItem.description: A collection item with resolved content. Fields vary by item_type.

get.summary: List prompts visible to the authenticated user

200.description: Prompt with active version and counts
List of branches with version counts and HEAD info

List starred results across all prompts
Get a collection with its items

post.summary: Evaluate a result against its prompt using LLM quality dimensions

get.summary: Get latest evaluation scores for a result

post.description: Remove yourself from a team. Blocked if you are the sole owner.

404.description: Not a member of this team

422.description: Cannot leave — you are the sole owner

get.summary: List active pipelines with channel counts
